victoria.pending_legislation: Victoria has introduced a 7.5% short-stay levy (effective Jan 2025). Active political discussion about potential night caps in inner Melbourne. Monitor City of Melbourne council meetings for updates.
victoria.notes: Victoria is relatively permissive for STR but the 7.5% levy increases operating costs. No permit required but properties must comply with building codes and owners corporation rules. HOA/OC restrictions vary per building.

new_south_wales.pending_legislation: 180-night cap for unhosted STR in Greater Sydney (already in effect). Exempt hosted properties. Some councils seeking tighter restrictions.
new_south_wales.notes: NSW is more regulated than VIC. Non-hosted STR in Greater Sydney capped at 180 nights/year.

queensland.pending_legislation: No current night cap legislation. Gold Coast actively courts STR. Brisbane saw increased STR post-Olympics announcement.
queensland.notes: Queensland is the most permissive major STR market in Australia.

default.notes: Default Australian STR regulation profile. Verify local council rules.
